title: An old letter I found
summary: Tell the story of an old letter you found at home and what was inside it.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about an old letter you once found. Say where you found it, who wrote it, and how you felt. Use past simple.
hintStarters: Last month, I found an old letter in…
When I read it, I felt…
sampleText: Last month, I cleaned the bottom drawer of my old wardrobe. I found a small envelope with yellow paper inside. It was an old letter from my father. He wrote it twenty years ago, before he was sick. The handwriting was small and careful. The letter was only one page. He wrote about his garden, his cat, and the day I started school. He said he was proud of me. I read it three times. I did not cry, but I felt warm in my chest. There was also a small black-and-white photo in the envelope. The photo showed my father in front of our old house. He was young and smiling. I put the letter back in the envelope. I keep it now in a wooden box on my shelf. Sometimes when I miss him, I open the box and I read the letter again. Small things from the past can carry a lot of love.

sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: chữ viết nhỏ và cẩn thận
mang theo rất nhiều tình yêu

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Past simple regular and irregular
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Động từ thường thêm -ed: 'cleaned', 'wrote' (irregular từ write), 'showed', 'started'. Một số động từ bất quy tắc: write → wrote, find → found, put → put.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Regular verbs add -ed: 'cleaned', 'started'. Irregular verbs change form: write → wrote, find → found, put → put.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Time markers in the past
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng cụm thời gian quá khứ: 'last month', 'twenty years ago', 'before he was sick'. Chúng cho biết khi nào việc xảy ra.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use past time markers: 'last month', 'twenty years ago', 'before he was sick'. They show when something happened.

sampleTranslationVi: Tháng trước, tôi dọn ngăn kéo dưới cùng của cái tủ áo cũ. Tôi tìm thấy một phong bì nhỏ với giấy ngả vàng bên trong. Đó là một lá thư cũ của bố tôi. Ông viết nó hai mươi năm trước, trước khi ông bị bệnh. Chữ viết nhỏ và cẩn thận. Lá thư chỉ có một trang. Ông viết về khu vườn, con mèo, và ngày tôi bắt đầu đi học. Ông nói ông tự hào về tôi. Tôi đọc nó ba lần. Tôi không khóc, nhưng tôi thấy ấm trong lồng ngực. Trong phong bì cũng có một tấm ảnh đen trắng nhỏ. Tấm ảnh chụp bố tôi đứng trước căn nhà cũ. Ông trẻ và đang mỉm cười. Tôi đặt lá thư trở lại phong bì. Bây giờ tôi cất nó trong một cái hộp gỗ trên kệ. Đôi khi khi tôi nhớ ông, tôi mở hộp ra và đọc lại lá thư. Những vật nhỏ từ quá khứ có thể mang theo rất nhiều tình yêu.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where did the writer find the letter?
options: In the bottom drawer of an old wardrobe
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I cleaned the bottom drawer of my old wardrobe' and found it there.
mcQuestions.hint: Look at the place mentioned in the first sentence.

mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'It was an old letter from my father'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the writer of the letter.

mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'He wrote it twenty years ago'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What is the past simple of 'find'?
What did the father write about?
options: His garden, his cat, and the day the writer started school
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'He wrote about his garden, his cat, and the day I started school'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the three things mentioned together.

mcQuestions.prompt: How did the writer feel after reading the letter?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I felt warm in my chest'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What was also in the envelope?
options: A black-and-white photo of the father
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'There was also a small black-and-white photo in the envelope'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the second item in the envelope.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where does the writer keep the letter now?
options: In a wooden box on a shelf
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I keep it now in a wooden box on my shelf'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the current location of the letter.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which past simple sentence is correct?
options: I am read it three times.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'read' is irregular. The past simple is also written 'read' (but pronounced /red/).
mcQuestions.hint: 'read' looks the same in past and present, but the sound changes.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence is correct past simple negative?
mcQuestions.explanation: Past simple negative: 'did not' + base verb. 'I did not cry'.
mcQuestions.hint: Use 'did not' with the base form.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why is a handwritten letter often more powerful than a phone message? What do we lose when we stop writing letters by hand?
